message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor User

participant "QuerySet" as QuerySet
participant "QueryParser" as QueryParser
participant "Tokenizer" as Tokenizer

User -> QuerySet : 1 QuerySet()
User -> QuerySet : 2 add("longitude", "*/CLON")
QuerySet -> QueryParser : 3 parse(queryString)
QueryParser -> Tokenizer : 4 tokenize(queryString)
QueryParser <-- Tokenizer : 5 tokens

loop all sub-queries
    QueryParser -> "Query" as Query : 6 Query()
    
    loop all components
        QueryParser -> "QueryComponent" as QueryComponent : 7 QueryComponent()
        QueryParser -> Query : 8 push_back(component)
    end
end

User <-- QueryParser : 9 queries

@enduml
```
